title: Dense Garlic Adventurous Christmas Pudding Stir-fry
description: A unique and savory dish combining the rich flavors of Christmas pudding with a kick from garlic, prepared sous-vide for optimal texture.

ingredients.name: Christmas pudding
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality Christmas pudding from a reputable brand.

ingredients.name: Garlic paste
ingredients.notes: For a milder flavor, use crushed garlic instead of garlic paste.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use high-heat olive oil for sous-vide cooking and stir-frying.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Choose low-sodium soy sauce if sugar-free is a concern.

ingredients.name: Fresh ginger juice (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a subtle spicy kick, use fresh ginger instead of powdered ginger.

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 49°C (120°F). Place Christmas pudding in a vacuum seal bag and cook for about 30 minutes.
In a large skillet or wok, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic paste and stir-fry until fragrant but not burnt, approximately 3-5 minutes.
Add soy sauce and mirin (if using) to the pan. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly coated in sauce.
Remove Christmas pudding from sous-vide bag and slice into bite-sized pieces if needed. Add to skillet with garlic-sauce mixture.
Stir-fry gently for about 2-3 minutes, allowing flavors to blend but preventing overcooking the pudding.
If using ginger juice, add it at this step to enhance flavor. Adjust seasoning with salt or sugar as needed.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course accompaniment.
